summary: GM proposed 3 product ideas: (1) Crewspace Visual Platform with open-core strategy (overlap with Researcher/PM), (2) CrewEmbed — embeddable agent workflow SDK with usage-based pricing (UNIQUE idea), (3) Crewspace OSS-First Framework with commercial cloud. Recommended combining Proposals 1+3 into phased 'Next.js + Vercel for Agents' strategy. Key unique insights: TypeScript gap (20M+ devs underserved), conservative revenue projections ($358K ARR month 12), and embeddable SDK as novel business model.
